name: PA.4 RAG regression baseline
notes: Pytest uses deterministic fixture rankings and answers so CI can gate PA.4 without a live Qdrant or LLM stack.
The live runner can compare stack output with this file via scripts/eval_rag_retrieval.py --baseline docs/benchmark/RAG_PA4_BASELINE.json.
Broaden this baseline when PB adds multi-hop GraphRAG cases.
